The CLI entry point is bin/cli.js and the deterministic engines live in scripts/ (scan.py, canonicalize.py, check_drift.py, eval_run.py).
Parse installer manifests fail-closed, reject symlinked state, and replace valid state atomically.
No. HIGH security findings are ineligible for baselines and remain active.
MCP tools stay read-only, and findings are not operational failures.
A feature uses a minor version bump; a bugfix-only release uses a patch bump.
Installer smoke tests may write only to an isolated HOME, never the real user HOME.
CI must verify current task and evidence fingerprints before trusting health.
Synchronize negotiated-version wire shapes, and never send modern-only fields to legacy MCP clients.

The baseline includes secret scanning, push protection, Dependabot security updates, required CI contexts, and conversation resolution. Admin bypass is only for sole-maintainer self-approval deadlock and never for red CI.
registry.npmjs.org
Same-scope differences are conflicts; ancestor-to-descendant differences are visible non-blocking overrides.
--max-bytes limits semantic text only; full-file SHA, line count, and security checks still cover the complete file with bounded memory.
A rerun may skip npm only when the published gitHead and packed tarball shasum match the exact release tag.
